goal: SQL: births counts in sim_masterv2_v9 for datasets (20250704,id1) and (20251230,id2)

assumptions: Assumed version_date/version_id pairs are correct target datasets; no other datasets required. Risks if false: missing or mispaired dataset could skew counts.
changes: Read-only SELECTs in ClickHouse; no code changes.
evidence_pack: Backfill2.1 standard: evidence source=Facts/Changes in legacy record.
facts: ClickHouse SELECT executed on sim_masterv2_v9 with group_by in (1,2) and dataset pairs (20250704,id1) and (20251230,id2). Results: dataset agg -> (20250704,id1) birth_0_2=45, birth_0_3=6, birth_total=51, days_with_births_0_2=40; (20251230,id2) birth_0_2=44, birth_0_3=0, birth_total=44, days_with_births_0_2=38. Group_by breakdown -> (20250704,id1,g1) 5/0/5/5; (20250704,id1,g2) 40/6/46/35; (20251230,id2,g1) 3/0/3/3; (20251230,id2,g2) 41/0/41/35. Checked system.columns: day_u16 exists in sim_masterv2_v9. Reasoning steps: verified day_u16 presence before using countDistinctIf; filtered to group_by IN (1,2) per requirement.
goal: Сделай read-only SQL в ClickHouse по таблице  для двух датасетов: - version_date=20250704, version_id=1 - version_date=20251230, version_id=2 Нужно вернуть количество рождений: 1) агрегатно по dataset (group_by IN (1,2)):    - birth_0_2 = countIf(pre_status_id=0 AND status_id=2)    - birth_0_3 = countIf(pre_status_id=0 AND status_id=3)    - birth_total = countIf(pre_status_id=0 AND status_id IN (2,3)) 2) разрез по group_by (1 и 2) с теми же метриками. Опционально: добавь days_with_births_0_2 = countDistinctIf(day_u16, pre_status_id=0 AND status_id=2). Верни компактные таблицы и короткий вывод.
